Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: underwear and accessories for shaping and supporting [300209268], underwear [300209267], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Padding woven or inserted into the calves of stockings to produce the appearance of more rounded calves of the wearer; patented in 1788 and worn in the 17th, 18th and 19th century.
Almohadilla cosida dentro de las pantorrillas de las medias para exagerar y producir la apariencia de pantorrillas más varoniles. Patentado en 1788.
Vullingen om in herenkousen te steken; bedoeld om de onderbenen meer vorm te geven. Gedragen in de 17e, 18e en 19e eeuw.

Source.Source_ID: 2000099282/Mankey Calasibetta, C., Fairchild's Dictionary of Fashion. (Tweede druk, New York 1998)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Kissen, das in die Wade eines Strumpfes gewebt wird, um aufzubauschen und um mannhafte Waden zu schaffen; im Jahre 1788 patentiert.

Source.Source_ID: 2000099282/Mankey Calasibetta, C., Fairchild's Dictionary of Fashion. (Tweede druk, New York 1998)
2000105471/Cremers-van der Does, The Agony of Fashion (1980)

Term_Source.Page: term suggested by consultants at outside review 5/92

Source.Source_ID: 2000007861/Cunnington et al., Dictionary of English Costume (1965)

2000105393/Bruna, D., Fashioning the body. An intimate history of the silhouette. (New York 2015)
